# Dark Star Tattoo — Salem, OR
> Dark Star Tattoo is a licensed tattoo & piercing studio in Salem, Oregon offering custom tattoos, cover-ups, piercing, and bilingual (English/Spanish) service. 2360 State St. Call (503) 763-9696. Book a free consult. An East-side studio on State St — custom work and walk-ins.

## Services
- Custom tattoos
- Cover-ups
- Fine-line & blackwork
- Flash & walk-ins
- Piercing
- Jewelry

## Service area
- Salem, Keizer, West Salem, Marion County (ZIPs: 97301)

## Contact
- Call/text: (503) 763-9696 · Hours: Tue–Sat 12–8pm · Sun–Mon closed · Languages: English, Español
